_comment: EXAMPLE config showing the GTM MCP stack I built and wired up. Sanitized: every credential is a ${ENV_VAR} placeholder, all paths are relative, no real tokens or hosted URLs. Servers marked 'custom-built' are MCP servers I wrote; the rest are published servers I configured into the stack.

hubspot-admin._note: custom-built — HubSpot Admin MCP server with full platform control

unifygtm._note: custom-built — MCP server for the Unify GTM Data API

outreach._note: custom-built — MCP server for the Outreach.io API (stdio). Also deployed as an HTTP-transport variant.

linkedin-ads._note: custom-built — MCP server for the LinkedIn Marketing API (Ads Analytics)

apollo-io._note: published — built agents/skills on top of: sales-intelligence enrichment + search

crustdata._note: published — built on top of: LinkedIn person/company enrichment + recent posts (powers personalized-outbound)

clay._note: published — built on top of: AI-native GTM data enrichment + workflow tooling

posthog._note: published — built on top of: product analytics via HogQL (powers attribution engine)

google-ads._note: published — built on top of: paid-search analytics via GAQL
